root.sql:
SELECT sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.address,
sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode, sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name,
sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name,
'' as certificate_date, '' as data_group, '' as data_type, '' as data_balance, '' as data_refno , '' as data_monthly
, '' as dep_name
, '' as loan_name
, '' as est_int
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) /*WHERE*/
